case_title: MANCUSO, NINA vs. SCHOW, CRAIG et al

docket_entries.description: AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MANCUSO, NINA AS TO DEFENDANT SCHOW, CRAIG IVANOVSKY, NATASHA
